name: A l i u l

phones: Specialized in aeronautical engineering with a focus on avionics, satellite communication, and high-speed vehicle communication. Experienced
•  Developed and tested helical, Yagi-Uda, and dipole antennas for miniature satellite applications.
•  Successfully established communication with NOAA satellites and the International Space Station.

experience: Proof Reader, PVC Printing Machine Operator
Operated  and  maintained  digital  printing  machines  at  Royal  Ad,  ensuring  high-quality  output  and
efficient  workflow.  Focused  on  precision,  troubleshooting,  and  routine  maintenance  to  support
continuous production and meet client demands.
●   Worked as a chief editor and proof reader for a very long time
●   Operated the 6ft & 10ft PVC/ Pana/ Vinyl media printing machine.
